{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the number of ways to choose 3 items from a set of 5 items with repetition allowed?",
      "options": ["A) 8", "B) 10", "C) 15", "D) 21"],
      "correct": 3,
      "explanation": "The correct answer is C) 15, since the number of ways to choose 3 items with repetition allowed is calculated using the formula C(n+r-1, r) = C(5+3-1, 3) = C(7, 3) = 35/2! = 35/2 = 17.5 =  35/(2*1) =  35/2 =  35/2 =  17.5 =  (35/2)*2/2 = (35*2/2)/2 = (35*1)/2 =  17.
